content:
type: CLAIM
files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
summary: Adding optional on-disk compression (gzip/zlib) with magic-header format and adaptive eviction knobs (cull_limit, eviction_policy) to Cache/configure_cache

fields.summary: Adding optional on-disk compression (gzip/zlib) with magic-header format and adaptive eviction knobs (cull_limit, eviction_policy) to Cache/configure_cache

content:
type: STATUS
files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
summary: Compression implemented and tested: added compress/cull_limit/eviction_policy params to Cache.__init__ and configure_cache, added Cache.set_compression(), _encode_disk_value()/_decode_disk_value() helpers, put()/get() now route disk bytes through them; edits are additive, only touched __init__ signature, put/get bodies, and added new methods+constants - should merge cleanly with additive TTL params as long as we both add new kwargs rather than reordering existing ones

fields.summary: Compression implemented and tested: added compress/cull_limit/eviction_policy params to Cache.__init__ and configure_cache, added Cache.set_compression(), _encode_disk_value()/_decode_disk_value() helpers, put()/get() now route disk bytes through them; edits are additive, only touched __init__ signature, put/get bodies, and added new methods+constants - should merge cleanly with additive TTL params as long as we both add new kwargs rather than reordering existing ones
